| Display messages                                                                                                            | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| <b>Shift to 'P' or 'N' to Start Engine</b>                                                                                  | <p>You have attempted to start the engine with the transmission in position <b>R</b> or <b>D</b>.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Shift the transmission to position <b>P</b> or <b>N</b>.</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| <b>P</b><br><b>Shift to 'P'</b>                                                                                             | <p>You have attempted to stop the engine with the Start/Stop button while the transmission was not in position <b>P</b>.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Shift the transmission to position <b>P</b>.</li> </ul> <p>While the HOLD function or DISTRONIC PLUS is active, you have:</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>• opened the driver's door and released the seat belt or</li> <li>• switched off the engine or</li> <li>• opened the hood</li> </ul> <p>A tone may also sound at regular intervals. The tone becomes louder if you attempt to lock the vehicle.</p> <p>You cannot start the engine.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Shift the transmission to position <b>P</b>.<br/>You can restart the engine.</li> </ul> |
| <img alt="Icon of a car with an open trunk lid" data-bbox="61 920 116 954" src="5261154d48e3f9f7320854b77502e6d5_img.jpg"/> | <p>The trunk lid is open.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Close the trunk lid.</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

| Display messages                                                                                                                         | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="Icon of a car with the hood open" data-bbox="81 120 137 150" src="856422814dabbf6b603c06a347491769_img.jpg"/>                  | <p><b>⚠ Risk of accident</b></p> <p>The hood is open.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Pull over and stop the vehicle safely as soon as possible, paying attention to road and traffic conditions.</li> <li>► Apply the parking brake.</li> <li>► Close the hood.</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| <img alt="Icon of a car with a door open" data-bbox="81 288 137 318" src="2cad7de2090e0862d184c3ac90062094_img.jpg"/>                    | <p>At least one door is open.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Close all the doors.</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| <img alt="Icon of a backrest" data-bbox="81 356 137 385" src="cd352004eba967512a547d3f550f2216_img.jpg"/>                                | <p><b>⚠ Risk of injury</b></p> <p>The backrest in the rear is not engaged on the left-hand and/or right-hand side.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Push the backrest back until it engages.</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| <p>Rear Left Backrest<br/>Not Latched or Rear<br/>Right Backrest Not<br/>Latched</p>                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

Contact the nearest qualified specialist workshop.</li> </ul> |
| <p>Power Steering<br/>Malfunction See<br/>Operator's Manual</p>                                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Phone No Service                                                                                                                         | <p>Your vehicle is outside the network provider's transmitter/receiver range.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Wait until the mobile phone operational readiness symbol appears in the multifunction display.</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| <img alt="Icon of a washer fluid reservoir" data-bbox="81 837 137 866" src="6da50d9c4f269b0a76c32d496ad656e4_img.jpg"/>                  | <p>The washer fluid level in the washer fluid reservoir has dropped below the minimum.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Add washer fluid (► page 281).</li> </ul>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Check Washer Fluid                                                                                                                       |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

| Display messages                                                                                                                                                             | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| <img alt="Icon: SmartKey with a lock symbol" data-bbox="61 154 116 188" src="2e02535e00afa3efaedf63422e03b2d3_img.jpg"/><br><b>Key Does Not Belong to Vehicle</b>            | <p>You have put the wrong SmartKey in the ignition lock.</p> <p>► Use the correct SmartKey.</p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

| <img alt="Icon: SmartKey with a lock symbol" data-bbox="61 333 116 367" src="6a8497da7dc12118cbc6a2f82b135bac_img.jpg"/><br><b>Obtain a New Key</b>                          | <p>The SmartKey needs to be replaced.</p> <p>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

| <img alt="Icon: SmartKey with a lock symbol" data-bbox="61 473 116 507" src="10f0cf961309e52580b08a475a7afc3d_img.jpg"/><br><b>Don't Forget Your Key</b>                     | <p>The display message is shown for a maximum of 60 seconds and is only a reminder.</p> <p>You have opened the driver's door with the engine switched off. The KEYLESS-GO key is not in the ignition lock.</p> <p>► Remember to take the KEYLESS-GO key with you when you leave the vehicle.</p>                                                                                                         |
| <img alt="Icon: SmartKey with a lock symbol" data-bbox="61 624 116 658" src="0047d0ccc154d8572b5f39288c9aaf5a_img.jpg"/><br><b>Key Not Detected</b><br>(red display message) | <p>The KEYLESS-GO key is not in the vehicle.</p> <p>A warning tone also sounds.</p> <p>If the engine is switched off, you can no longer lock the vehicle centrally or start the engine.</p> <p>► Pull over and stop the vehicle safely as soon as possible, paying attention to road and traffic conditions.</p> <p>► Apply the parking brake.</p> <p>► Locate the KEYLESS-GO key.</p>                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                              | <p>The KEYLESS-GO key is not detected while the engine is running because there is interference from a strong source of radio waves.</p> <p>A warning tone also sounds.</p> <p>► Pull over and stop the vehicle safely as soon as possible, paying attention to road and traffic conditions.</p> <p>► Engage the parking brake.</p> <p>► Operate the vehicle with the SmartKey in the ignition lock.</p> |

| Display messages                                                                                                                                                                                | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="Icon for 'Key Not Detected' message" data-bbox="81 120 137 152" src="3ab880ad9462d100f9dda03b1abd4b83_img.jpg"/> <p><b>Key Not Detected</b><br/>(White display message)</p>           | <p>The KEYLESS-GO key cannot be detected at present.</p> <p>► Change the location of the key with the KEYLESS-GO functions in the vehicle.</p> <p>If the KEYLESS-GO key is still not detected:</p> <p>► Operate the vehicle with the SmartKey in the ignition lock.</p> |
| <img alt="Icon for 'Key Detected in Vehicle' message" data-bbox="81 264 137 295" src="aba8fc7896f0d2b5da9e5af29d6bcf81_img.jpg"/> <p><b>Key Detected in Vehicle</b></p>                         | <p>The KEYLESS-GO key has been detected inside the vehicle during locking.</p> <p>► Remove the KEYLESS-GO key from the vehicle.</p>                                                                                                                                     |
| <img alt="Icon for 'Remove Start Button and Insert Key' message" data-bbox="81 353 137 385" src="980d80b9841202745d9a8733aeefa2b6_img.jpg"/> <p><b>Remove 'Start' Button and Insert Key</b></p> | <p>KEYLESS-GO is temporarily malfunctioning or is defective. A warning tone also sounds.</p> <p>► Insert the SmartKey into the ignition lock and turn it to the desired position.</p> <p>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</p>                                   |
| <img alt="Icon for 'Close Doors to Lock Vehicle' message" data-bbox="81 486 137 517" src="b40e339940ddda1357ddcd3cdd8ca186_img.jpg"/> <p><b>Close Doors to Lock Vehicle</b></p>                 | <p>At least one door is open. A warning tone also sounds.</p> <p>► Close all doors and lock the vehicle again.</p>                                                                                                                                                      |

## Warning and indicator lamps in the instrument cluster

### Seat belt

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                              |
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="Icon for seat belt warning lamp" data-bbox="81 712 112 732" src="ff8324980e31a3ed0b9b04ff69f0449e_img.jpg"/> <p>After starting the engine, the red seat belt warning lamp lights up for six seconds.</p>                                           | <p>The seat belt warning lamp reminds the driver and front passenger to fasten their seat belts.</p> <p>► Fasten your seat belt (&gt; page 48).</p>       |
| <img alt="Icon for seat belt warning lamp" data-bbox="81 840 112 860" src="23959b14b4616c6150c4143bf94eda15_img.jpg"/> <p>After starting the engine, the red seat belt warning lamp lights up. In addition, a warning tone sounds for up to six seconds.</p> | <p><b>⚠ Risk of injury</b></p> <p>The driver's seat belt is not fastened.</p> <p>► Fasten your seat belt (&gt; page 48).<br/>The warning tone ceases.</p> |

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="Warning lamp icon for seat belt" data-bbox="58 117 92 140" src="9562ef1f381b02e929ffe3439179ae69_img.jpg"/> <p>The red seat belt warning lamp lights up after the engine starts, as soon as the driver's or the front-passenger door is closed.</p> | <p><img alt="Warning triangle icon" data-bbox="246 120 266 143" src="9584d0847c3d4bdad771c9acac7c5edd_img.jpg"/> <b>Risk of injury</b></p> <p>The driver or front passenger has not fastened their seat belt.</p> <p>► Fasten your seat belt (&gt; page 48).<br/>The warning lamp goes out.</p> <hr/> <p><img alt="Warning triangle icon" data-bbox="246 240 266 263" src="c70ab5fd974c2afdf67f7f91a937e296_img.jpg"/> <b>Risk of injury</b></p> <p>There are objects on the front-passenger seat.</p> <p>► Remove the objects from the front-passenger seat and stow them in a secure place.<br/>The warning lamp goes out.</p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| <img alt="Warning lamp icon for seat belt" data-bbox="58 375 92 397" src="0992cd590cabfbe662000e04d9ae9d0c_img.jpg"/> <p>The red seat belt warning lamp flashes and an intermittent audible warning sounds.</p>                                               | <p><img alt="Warning triangle icon" data-bbox="246 378 266 400" src="9538792ee4ea3cf89f82592a602dce66_img.jpg"/> <b>Risk of injury</b></p> <p>The driver or front passenger has not fastened their seat belt. In addition, you are driving faster than 15 mph (25 km/h) or you have briefly driven faster than 15 mph (25 km/h).</p> <p>► Fasten your seat belt (&gt; page 48).<br/>The warning lamp goes out and the intermittent warning tone ceases.</p> <hr/> <p><img alt="Warning triangle icon" data-bbox="246 554 266 576" src="6dfe47b919b2837463a086ff75eebc66_img.jpg"/> <b>Risk of injury</b></p> <p>There are objects on the front-passenger seat. In addition, you are driving faster than 15 mph (25 km/h) or you have briefly driven faster than 15 mph (25 km/h).</p> <p>► Remove the objects from the front-passenger seat and stow them in a secure place.<br/>The warning lamp goes out and the intermittent warning tone ceases.</p> |

**Safety systems****Problem****Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions****BRAKE** (USA only)**(D)** (Canada only)

The red brake system warning lamp comes on while the engine is running. A warning tone also sounds.

**⚠ Risk of accident**

There is not enough brake fluid in the brake fluid reservoir.

- Pull over and stop the vehicle safely as soon as possible, paying attention to road and traffic conditions. Do not continue driving under any circumstances.
- Engage the parking brake.
- Consult a qualified specialist workshop immediately.
- Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.

Do not add brake fluid. This will not rectify the malfunction.

**⚠ WARNING**

Driving with the brake warning lamp illuminated can result in an accident. Have your brake system checked immediately if the brake warning lamp stays on. Do not add brake fluid before checking the brake system.

Overfilling the brake fluid reservoir can result in spilling brake fluid on hot engine parts and the brake fluid catching fire. You can be seriously burned.

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                        | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="ABS warning lamp icon" data-bbox="61 120 92 140" src="503d201db44c9c6a33e831423ef3ef04_img.jpg"/><br>The yellow ABS warning lamp is lit while the engine is running. | <p><img alt="Warning triangle icon" data-bbox="246 123 266 143" src="942168f095fb430a319d3e4a8872d407_img.jpg"/> <b>Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ABS (Anti-lock Brake System) is deactivated due to a malfunction. BAS (Brake Assist), BAS PLUS, ESP® (Electronic Stability Program), PRE-SAFE® Brake, the HOLD function and hill start assist are therefore also deactivated, for example.</p> <p>The brake system continues to function normally, but without the functions listed above. The wheels could therefore lock if you brake hard, for example.</p> <p>ATTENTION ASSIST is deactivated.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</li> <li>► Drive on carefully.</li> <li>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</li> </ul> <p>If the ABS control unit is faulty, there is also a possibility that other systems, such as the navigation system or the automatic transmission, will not be available.</p>                                                                                                                                                                         |
| <img alt="ABS warning lamp icon" data-bbox="61 512 92 532" src="64c7593341997554c41b106cc8a3da01_img.jpg"/><br>The yellow ABS warning lamp is lit while the engine is running. | <p><img alt="Warning triangle icon" data-bbox="246 515 266 535" src="044c7a012abcfa8d9a62fb2301eb9fb5_img.jpg"/> <b>Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ABS is temporarily unavailable. BAS, BAS PLUS, ESP®, EBD (electronic brake force distribution), PRE-SAFE® Brake, the HOLD function, hill start assist are therefore also deactivated, for example.</p> <p>Self diagnosis is not yet complete or the on-board voltage may be insufficient, for example.</p> <p>The brake system continues to function normally, but without the functions listed above. The wheels could therefore lock if you brake hard, for example.</p> <p>ATTENTION ASSIST is deactivated.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Carefully drive a suitable distance making slight steering movements at a speed above 12 mph (20 km/h).<br/>The functions mentioned above are available again when the warning lamp goes out.</li> </ul> <p>If the warning lamp is still on:</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</li> <li>► Drive on carefully.</li> <li>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</li> </ul> |

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="Yellow ABS warning lamp icon" data-bbox="78 117 113 140" src="a4b74cdcb27184a7d6360a916cc01c76_img.jpg"/><br>The yellow ABS warning lamp is lit while the engine is running. A warning tone also sounds.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | <p><b>⚠ Risk of accident</b></p> <p>EBD is faulty. Therefore, ABS, BAS, BAS PLUS, ESP®, PRE-SAFE®, PRE-SAFE® Brake, the HOLD function and hill start assist are unavailable, for example.</p> <p>The brake system continues to function normally, but without the functions listed above. The wheels could therefore lock if you brake hard, for example.</p> <p>ATTENTION ASSIST is deactivated.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</li> <li>► Drive on carefully.</li> <li>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</li> </ul>                |
| <img alt="BRAKE lamp icon" data-bbox="78 420 113 442" src="8284a7dbe3631607fc7b70cfdc72e208_img.jpg"/> (USA only)<br><img alt="Brake fluid level warning lamp icon" data-bbox="78 442 113 464" src="1426c83977b9ab81999f0f85e491e247_img.jpg"/> (Canada only)<br><img alt="Red brake warning lamp icon" data-bbox="78 464 113 487" src="8aa159ae7e05c76f7ac0f166e31f7bdf_img.jpg"/> <img alt="ESP OFF warning lamp icon" data-bbox="117 464 148 487" src="a63fe35c22e3a88c4f2b77897508cd28_img.jpg"/> <img alt="Yellow ABS warning lamp icon" data-bbox="152 464 184 487" src="a28e4cc4c97fd301ea0b095c7cc3b992_img.jpg"/><br>The red brake warning lamp, the yellow ESP® and ESP® OFF warning lamps and the yellow ABS warning lamp are lit while the engine is running. | <p><b>⚠ Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ABS and ESP® are faulty. Therefore, BAS, BAS PLUS, EBD, PRE-SAFE® Brake, the HOLD function and hill start assist, for example, are unavailable due to a malfunction.</p> <p>The brake system continues to function normally, but without the functions listed above. The wheels could therefore lock if you brake hard, for example.</p> <p>ATTENTION ASSIST is deactivated.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</li> <li>► Drive on carefully.</li> <li>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</li> </ul> |
| <img alt="Yellow ESP® warning lamp icon" data-bbox="78 722 113 744" src="0addccacca0dade093883741f8273ae3_img.jpg"/><br>The yellow ESP® warning lamp flashes while the vehicle is in motion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | <p><b>⚠ Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ESP® or traction control has intervened because there is a risk of skidding or at least one wheel has started to spin.</p> <p>Cruise control or DISTRONIC PLUS is deactivated.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Only depress the accelerator pedal as far as necessary when pulling away.</li> <li>► Ease off the accelerator pedal while the vehicle is in motion.</li> <li>► Adapt your driving style to suit the road and weather conditions.</li> <li>► Do not deactivate ESP®.</li> </ul> <p>Exceptions: (&gt; page 61).</p>                                               |

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="ESP OFF warning lamp icon" data-bbox="61 120 92 143" src="ddadd63f4339e884298d07407e7707a1_img.jpg"/><br>The yellow ESP® OFF warning lamp is lit while the engine is running.                                              | <p>⚠ <b>Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ESP® is deactivated. ESP® will not stabilize the vehicle if it starts to skid or if a wheel starts to spin.</p> <p>► Reactivate ESP®.</p> <p>Exceptions: (&gt; page 61).</p> <p>► Adapt your driving style to suit the road and weather conditions.</p> <p>If ESP® cannot be activated:</p> <p>► Have ESP® checked at a qualified specialist workshop.</p>                                                                                                                                                           |
| <img alt="SPORT handling mode warning lamp icon" data-bbox="61 352 94 370" src="4a13a556a9536732147b57465ddeacb4_img.jpg"/><br>AMG vehicles only:<br>The yellow SPORT handling mode warning lamp is lit while the engine is running. | <p>⚠ <b>Risk of accident</b></p> <p>SPORT handling mode is activated. ESP® only stabilizes the vehicle in extreme situations. ESP® intervention may not be able to provide sufficient assistance in such situations and the vehicle may start to skid.</p> <p>► Reactivate ESP®.</p> <p>Exceptions: (&gt; page 61).</p> <p>If ESP® cannot be activated:</p> <p>► Have ESP® checked at a qualified specialist workshop.</p>                                                                                                                               |
| <img alt="ESP OFF and BAS warning lamp icons" data-bbox="61 599 131 621" src="7a9e36fac60a8be514887d9c32da2c2e_img.jpg"/><br>The yellow ESP® and ESP® OFF warning lamps are lit while the engine is running.                         | <p>⚠ <b>Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ESP®, BAS, BAS PLUS, PRE-SAFE® Brake, the HOLD function and hill start assist are not available due to a malfunction. ESP® will not stabilize the vehicle if it starts to skid or if a wheel starts to spin.</p> <p>The brake system continues to function normally, but without the functions listed above.</p> <p>ATTENTION ASSIST is deactivated.</p> <p>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</p> <p>► Drive on carefully.</p> <p>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</p> |

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="ESP OFF warning lamp icon" data-bbox="79 116 149 138" src="439ab8040110585905bd0d4784bf2e72_img.jpg"/><br><p>The yellow ESP<sup>®</sup> and ESP<sup>®</sup> OFF warning lamps are lit while the engine is running.</p>                                                                                                                                                | <p>⚠ <b>Risk of accident</b></p> <p>ESP<sup>®</sup>, BAS, the HOLD function and hill start assist are temporarily unavailable.</p> <p>BAS PLUS and PRE-SAFE<sup>®</sup> Brake may also have failed.</p> <p>ESP<sup>®</sup> will not stabilize the vehicle if it starts to skid or if a wheel starts to spin.</p> <p>Self diagnosis is not yet complete.</p> <p>The brake system continues to function normally, but without the functions listed above. The wheels could therefore lock if you brake hard, for example.</p> <p>ATTENTION ASSIST is deactivated.</p> <p>► Carefully drive a suitable distance making slight steering movements at a speed above 12 mph (20 km/h).</p> <p>The functions mentioned above are available again when the warning lamp goes out.</p> <p>If the warning lamp is still on:</p> <p>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</p> <p>► Drive on carefully.</p> <p>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop.</p> |
| <img alt="BRAKE warning lamp icon" data-bbox="79 617 110 636" src="3bcc6b4c0936388bea1615a33a87cfd1_img.jpg"/> (USA only)<br><img alt="Parking brake warning lamp icon" data-bbox="79 641 110 660" src="c6324629ca3bdae48cc5d55962414186_img.jpg"/> (Canada only)<br><p>The red brake system warning lamp comes on while the vehicle is moving. A warning tone also sounds.</p> | <p>You are driving with the parking brake applied.</p> <p>► Release the parking brake</p> <p>The warning lamp goes out and the warning tone ceases.</p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| <img alt="SRS warning lamp icon" data-bbox="79 792 110 812" src="3a67bada44c87a2f253f48774e2b3220_img.jpg"/><br><p>The red SRS warning lamp is lit while the engine is running.</p>                                                                                                                                                                                             | <p>⚠ <b>Risk of injury</b></p> <p>The restraint systems are malfunctioning. The air bags or ETDs may either be triggered unintentionally or, in the event of an accident, not be triggered at all.</p> <p>► Drive on carefully.</p> <p>► Visit a qualified specialist workshop immediately.</p>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |

⚠ **WARNING**

In the event a malfunction of the SRS is indicated as outlined above, the SRS may not be operational.

For your safety, we strongly recommend that you contact an authorized Mercedes-Benz Center immediately to have the system checked. Otherwise the SRS may not be activated when needed in an accident, which could result in serious or fatal injury, or it might deploy unexpectedly and unnecessarily which could also result in injury.

## Engine

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|

Do not continue driving under any circumstances.</li><li>► Apply the parking brake.</li><li>► Consult a qualified specialist workshop.</li></ul> |

| Problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| <img alt="Warning lamp icon: a thermometer with a drop of liquid" data-bbox="61 120 92 143" src="854241f0b8cc5a30cc55c753e11104ea_img.jpg"/> <p>The red coolant warning lamp comes on while the engine is running.</p>                             | <p>The coolant level is too low.</p> <p>If the coolant level is correct, the airflow to the engine radiator may be blocked or the electric engine radiator fan may be malfunctioning.</p> <p>The coolant is too hot and the engine is no longer being cooled sufficiently.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</li> <li>► Pull over and stop the vehicle safely and switch off the engine, paying attention to road and traffic conditions.</li> <li>► Allow the engine and coolant to cool.</li> <li>► Check the coolant level and add coolant (&gt; page 280). Observe the warning notes.</li> <li>► If you need to add coolant more often than usual, have the engine coolant system checked.</li> <li>► Make sure that the air supply to the engine radiator is not blocked, e.g. by snow, slush or ice.</li> <li>► At coolant temperatures under 248 °F (120 °C), drive to the next qualified specialist workshop.</li> <li>► Avoid subjecting the engine to heavy loads, e.g. driving in mountainous terrain, and stop-and-go traffic.</li> </ul> |
| <img alt="Warning lamp icon: a thermometer with a drop of liquid" data-bbox="61 610 92 632" src="ba37ee21ea8ed5ba116dc106ad8eb8c5_img.jpg"/> <p>The red coolant warning lamp comes on while the engine is running. A warning tone also sounds.</p> | <p>The coolant temperature has exceeded 248 °F (120 °C). The airflow to the engine radiator may be blocked or the coolant level may be too low.</p> <p>The engine is not being cooled sufficiently and may be damaged.</p> <ul style="list-style-type: none"> <li>► Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.</li> <li>► Pull over and stop the vehicle safely and switch off the engine, paying attention to road and traffic conditions.</li> <li>► Allow the engine and coolant to cool.</li> <li>► Check the coolant level and add coolant (&gt; page 280). Observe the warning notes.</li> <li>► If you need to add coolant more often than usual, have the engine coolant system checked.</li> <li>► Make sure that the air supply to the engine radiator is not blocked, e.g. by snow, slush or ice.</li> <li>► At coolant temperatures under 248 °F (120 °C), drive to the next qualified specialist workshop.</li> <li>► Avoid subjecting the engine to heavy loads, e.g. driving in mountainous terrain, and stop-and-go traffic.</li> </ul>                                                     |

### Warning triangle icon **WARNING**

Driving when your engine is overheated can cause some fluids which may have leaked into the engine compartment to catch fire. You could be seriously burned.

Steam from an overheated engine can cause serious burns which can occur just by opening the engine hood. Stay away from the engine if you see or hear steam coming from it.

Stop the vehicle in a safe location away from other traffic. Turn off the engine, get out of the vehicle and do not stand near the vehicle until the engine has cooled down.

**!** If the coolant temperature exceeds 248 °F(120 °C) do not continue driving. The engine will otherwise be damaged.

### **Driving systems**

You may have to brake or take evasive action.</li> </ul> <p>More information about DISTRONIC PLUS (&gt; page 161) and PRE-SAFE® Brake (&gt; page 65).</p> |

## Tires

## Problem

## Possible causes/consequences and ► Solutions

![Tire pressure monitor warning lamp icon](c5bf7ef80c7e0bff8e90999e3d759ac8_img.jpg)

Tire pressure monitor warning lamp icon

USA only:

The yellow tire pressure monitor warning lamp (pressure loss/ malfunction) is lit.

Canada only:

The yellow tire pressure monitor warning lamp (pressure loss) is lit.

Image: Warning triangle icon

**Risk of accident**

The tire pressure monitor has detected a loss of pressure in at least one of the tires.

- Stop the vehicle without making any sudden steering or braking maneuvers. Pay attention to the traffic conditions as you do so.
- Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.
- Check the tire pressure. If necessary, correct the tire pressure (> page 319).
- If necessary, change a wheel (> page 334).

![Tire pressure monitor warning lamp icon](de94789efc8c225c7e7b9b630193fc54_img.jpg)

Tire pressure monitor warning lamp icon

USA only:

The yellow tire pressure monitor warning lamp (pressure loss/ malfunction) flashes for 60 seconds and then remains lit.

The tire pressure monitor is faulty.

- Observe the additional display messages in the multifunction display.
- Visit a qualified specialist workshop.

Image: Warning triangle icon

**WARNING**

Each tire, including the spare (if provided), should be checked at least every two weeks when cold and inflated to the pressure recommended by the vehicle manufacturer on the Tire and Loading Information placard on the driver's door B-pillar or, if available, the tire pressure label on the inside of the fuel filler flap. If your vehicle has tires of a different size than the size indicated on the Tire and Loading Information placard or the tire pressure label, you should determine the proper tire pressure for those tires.

As an added safety feature, your vehicle has been equipped with a tire pressure monitoring system (TPMS) that illuminates a low tire pressure telltale when one or more of your tires are significantly underinflated. Accordingly, when the low tire pressure telltale illuminates, you should stop and check your tires as soon as possible, and inflate them to the proper pressure. Driving on a significantly underinflated tire causes the tire to overheat and can lead to tire failure.

Underinflation also reduces fuel efficiency and tire tread life, and may affect the vehicle's handling and stopping ability. Please note that the TPMS is not a substitute for proper tire maintenance, and it is the driver's responsibility to maintain correct tire pressure, even if underinflation has not reached the level to trigger illumination of the TPMS low tire pressure telltale.

USA only:

Your vehicle has also been equipped with a TPMS malfunction indicator to indicate when the system is not operating properly. The TPMS malfunction indicator is combined with the low tire pressure telltale. When the system detects a malfunction, the telltale will flash for approximately 1 minute and then remain continuously illuminated. This sequence will be repeated every time

the vehicle is started as long as the malfunction exists. When the malfunction indicator is illuminated, the system may not be able to detect or signal low tire pressure as intended.

TPMS malfunctions may occur for a variety of reasons, including the installation of incompatible replacement or alternate tires or wheels on the vehicle that prevent the TPMS from functioning properly. Always check the TPMS malfunction telltale after replacing one or more tires or wheels on your vehicle to ensure that the replacement or alternate tires and wheels allow the TPMS to continue to function properly.
